name: yg-vanilla-js-helpers
description: A custom grid system and a stats overlay. For vanilla JS projects
author: Yassine Gallaoui

scripts.release: git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- || (echo "Git working directory not clean" && exit 1) && npm whoami > /dev/null 2>&1 || npm login && npm version patch -m "chore: release v%s" && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- || (echo "Git working directory not clean" && exit 1) && npm whoami > /dev/null 2>&1 || npm login && npm version minor -m "feat: release v%s" && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- || (echo "Git working directory not clean" && exit 1) && npm whoami > /dev/null 2>&1 || npm login && npm version major -m "BREAKING: release v%s" && npm publish --access public
